title: Battle of Ciutric (disambiguation)
content:
There were several '''battles for [[Ciutric IV|Ciutric]]''':

*The '''[[Evacuation of Ciutric|evacuation]]''' of Ciutric in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].
*The '''[[Battle of Ciutric]]'''.
*An '''[[Attack on the Ciutric system|attack]]''' on the [[Ciutric system/Legends|Ciutric system]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

{{Disambig}}
